questions.questionText: What mechanism ensures all validators upgrade to a new protocol version simultaneously in IOTA?

answerOptions.answerText: A consensus vote during the current epoch
Recording the new version in a special end-of-epoch transaction

questions.questionText: What happens if a validator does not support the current protocol version?

answerOptions.answerText: It is removed from the validator set
It continues participating but with limited functionality
It becomes a full node automatically

questions.questionText: How is the IOTA Move Framework upgraded across validators?

answerOptions.answerText: Through a hard fork of the chain
By recording the new framework in object 0x2 after validator consensus
By broadcasting updates over the P2P network
By pushing updates directly to user wallets
